reviews.review_title: DO NOT GET THIS GAME BEFORE YOU READ
reviews.review_description: Do not get this game if you like puzzles and adventure and pirate fantasies then do not get this game. Let me tell you I got halfway through this game and I got so soft lock there’s no saving progress so if you get soft lock, you have to do the tutorial go through all the dialogue which is like 10 minutes by itself and then make it back fun and good at the beginning, but unless you’re trying to get mad because you have to restart from the very beginning, do not get this  *by the way, I was on the part where you had to get a hand crank to cool down the commanders house it then disappeared and wasn’t in my inventory wasn’t on the ground and it was necessary to beating the level*

reviews.review_title: Read this first before downloading game
reviews.review_description: Seriously bad words in a game that's rated E?! I seriously want an update where no swear words are in the game so it's a one star review for now until you remove all Of the Dirty words out and add a full version of the game as well. ⭐️/⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
The game was really good, I played back in 2023 I believe, but I think the game was only meant for the hand tracking. Meaning there will most definitely not be a sequel 😔

***Update: didnt understand the handtracking portion. Now we do. Can't wait for the rest of the game!

Really enjoyed the story and graphics. The handle tracking was really tough. Also, wish we could have used the controllers to turn around, since we have to seat sometimes. Overall, would love to keep playing if these things were improved on.

I just played this game and holy, down to the puzzles to the storyline. It's over all a amazing game it just goes to quick, hopefully more story will be added to the game cause it was so fun to play.

S - tier game!

But the reason I only gave it 3 stars is because every time I try to exit possession even though I hold both hands up in every way the ring never appears other than that love this game great graphics but also maybe a better tutorial like where it sends you to a room to complete the tutorial before starting?
 having mannequins or characters you can practice on JUST FIGURED IT OUT BY WATCHING A YT TUT now that I know how to do everything I cannot wait for the full game! For anyone that is confused on how to exit possession you have to lean your head down bit while your hands are up

reviews.review_title: You will get stuck and no guide
reviews.review_description: I loved the graphics but it was very slow paced, you had to wait for the characters to stop their dialogues before continuing and you only have a small tiny circle of movement otherwise everything goes black. It definitely needs improvement I was excited but gave up after I possessed one of the guards and got the key in the door but there was no way to de-possess him or get out or open the door.
I played the whole run through, honestly the game play is so good! The only reason I’m rating 4 stars is because I wish there was more! I want more 😂

reviews.review_title: Fun Game Play but Starts over
reviews.review_description: I love puzzle, adventure games but this one has one very big flaw. You start over from the beginning every time. And it needs better hint system.
This is the type of app I’m always looking for, great graphics and decent puzzles to progress. Keep up the good work 👌
Really enjoyed playing this, didn't realise it wasn't a full game till it ended and I was gutted. I really hope a full game gets released
MORE GAME

Might be a good story and idea but if you move your head a centimeter you get a black screen, no play area or boundary.
Also cannot turn around with thumb sticks, often just facing a wall.
Tutorial is rubbish as if you read something and just remember it all.

I don't like waiting for all the dialogue either gets boring.
Couldn't play, no directions.
the game was ok the bird gave directions and yeah

I’m not an everyday player of puzzle adventure type games so maybe you all intuitively understand the mechanics but after I got out of the dungeon to talk to the parrot I got fed up and quit. The parrot asking “ do I have to spell it out for you”?  Yes, as a matter of fact you do cause the slow paced staring at me like I’d be able to know what to do next without any instruction just frustrated me to no end!

Fun little graphics is about the only positive I saw. 
A better tutorial for noobs and others like myself who usually only use vr for fitness games would go a long way to getting more players to stay.

my items keep disappearing in my hand when i need them and i can't get them back so i have to restart the entire game please fix it 
but other than that the game is really good thank you for this game
It was so bored

I loved playing this game. I got stuck a few times, but this game is so much fun. One thing that would make it even better was if there was more levels and challenges to complete I hope you do add more levels and challenges in the near future. ￼

reviews.review_title: Loved it please add to it!
reviews.review_description: Loved this game. I was sad it ended so quickly since i didn't realize it was a demo,. I REALLY hope they add more to it asap!!
early on i experienced bugs that made me un able to continue
So funny and puzzling

Not longer, plz make this happen loved it took a sec to figur out what to do but finally did and Couldn’t wait to see what’s next😁 THEN ended☹️ BUMMER DUDE . So great free and definitely recommend but smooth loco and length of the game was only things I wanted changed but if no mor adding to🥹 guess it was great while it lasted so …..😏😏😏😆
The game is to slow and not enough control movement I was very bored and lost concentration very easily

This game is very good but the only reason I rated it 4 stars is because the game goes by very fast. The ending is also kind of a cliff hanger. An idea for this game is to update and continue the story and make it longer. Overall this was a really good game for a demo.

We need more of this, please! This needs making into a full game. Just the right amount of difficulty to keep you interested, not like some games which are impossible, so you lose interest. you need to understand the instructions before you start, but once you get the hang of it, moving around is straightforward.

Typically, not my kind of game, but the more I played the more I wanted to play.  I saw the complaints in the reviews but basically it was about things like movement, saving and puzzles.  All of them go back to the fact that they DID NOT READ and understand the instructions at the very beginning. 

I had to read it through a couple of times before I really got how it worked. But once I did, I was able to complete the entire Demo game. 

To those complaining: 
1) It uses hand tracking. Put the controllers away outside your boundary and just use your hands. 

2) Watch the beginning instructions carefully and practice them before going into the game. 

3) You should play it standing so that you can turn, but I did play seated because I have a chair that turns all the way around. 

4) You DO NOT use any thumb sticks to move. Reach out to the blue light, grab ahold and pull yourself to the new location.  

5) If you get stuck, ASK THE BIRD by pointing your spirit power at the bird and give it a tug towards yourself. Answer his questions using the thumbs up sign. 

6) you also move by possessing the bodies of the other characters then getting out of them at the right time. 

7) It said right in the description that it is meant to play in one play and DOES NOT SAVE. Seriously people, try reading!

I really hope they finish this game and tell the entire story line. I am looking forward to finding out who killed me and why.

The game was good but every time I left the game and rejoined it restarted me I really didn't like this because I made really good progress it took me a long time to get to the part I was at but your game kept resetting me fix this right this instant 3 stars

Having problems when trying to possess someone. I've used both hand and controller but for some reason the second person I cant possess him when hes walks over to the candle with the rope to free the bird. Thing is I was able to do it a few weeks ago now I cant. 
Also does the game not save progress because it started me back to beginning every time

This game is fun and short you play as a dead man and you can possess the humans and like it said “this is a demo” sorry mode super short and fun but a little hard it is 30 minutes long [for me] you should download it the ending music is amazing and a parrot can see you and talk to you and British if you don’t like British people don’t download this yes the parrot is British [to me] and please add a sandbox mode please???
Bye
This is a charming Pirate puzzle adventure which is well designed and executed. Great escape room style problems to figure out. Really enjoyed playing it.
It was okay, when you get stuck it doesn’t really help. Had to leave because of frustration. Usually quite good puzzles.

reviews.review_title: Great potential needs a few things
reviews.review_description: I love this game and i think if they make it a full game that it would be incredible, however one of the things that needs work is the final puzzle, i had to watch a YouTube vid on how to do it and even then it didn't work.
Got out of. The first part and when you’re the time, I just couldn’t move at all it wouldn’t let me do anything. I can only pick up stuff. ￼
I really wish this was a real game. Also i wish there were checkpoints since the game crashed and started from the beginning so i never finished it.

The music, graphics & storytelling a really high quality. Theres no way to move or rotate when seated, and teleporting / possessing rely on facing in a certain direction. This seems like it could be fixed with some joystick or pinch air-drag controls. Lot’s of potential for a story game
I played for about 30mins-1hour. And I come back when my metas all done charging! All gone. Nothing! 0%. But it's a good game.

reviews.review_title: Really fun but not the best
reviews.review_description: I love this game idea but I would like it to be longer 😄
Just hurry up with the update please…

I can definitely see the "Monkey Island" influences in this one, which is fun.  The gameplay is pretty seamless and interesting, especially if you don't mind a bit of witty dialogue to ease you into the puzzles. You definitely have to play this standing up.  The music, story and graphics are really good.   I did have a bit of trouble with the hand-tracking, but hopefully that will be ironed out.  I look forward to the full version.
This game is a different to all the others games I have played and it’s not to easy  and not to hard is in between and I can’t wait for the full version

It’s very confusing to figure out and the hand tracking wasn’t working.  After 10 minutes of accomplishing nothing and getting frustrated, I just gave up.  I won’t be trying again.  The dialogue was funny, but long.  It seems like a cool idea, but it’s not  working yet.

This was such a fun game, o loved all of the game mechanics, especially where the npc's are confused about what happened.
I would definitely tell anyone to try this game
If you need any help I will try my best, this game has my full support
Can't wait for the full release

The idea seems cool but when you take over a character body you’re kinda stuck there so you can’t really finish any of the puzzles. Also in one of my attempts to play the Scottish/Irish (not sure which) character I  the beginning his hands got stuck together and had to restart and go through what feels like at least 5 minutes of dialogue and another characters hands tried to get stuck together again thankfully I was able to get them unstuck but wasn’t able to continue the game because there’s no way to walk in the game.
I really like this game.  :)  i wish i could continue.   Lol  patiently waiting for the full game release.
Love this short game
Great game and graphics. I like the humour. Puzzles are good. Trickiest puzzle was getting out of the humans. Can’t wait to buy it.
Very fun short game
..and the pace is very slow. Fun gameplay (when not frustrating).
How can I get a full release from this game ( Dead Mans Quest) ?

It seems like a great game, theres just no clear instructions. You cant move freely and it makes it very difficult. Posessing is also weird. I couldnt manage to get out of it after posessing the guy to free the bird. Definitely needs work
It’s the best hand tracking experience I have played. The art style feels like you are inside a Pixar short.
Crashes when attach the hook object to the box. Works better using controllers as hands tracking is a bit unreliable. It's a cool being able to possess characters!
This is what I've been waiting to see happen with VR; I'm a lifelong P&C game player, and I really, really, really hope this becomes a full-length adventure.

This amazed me. Well voiced characters. Excellent writing that is actually amusing and touching. Puzzles that are fun, and sometimes challenging. It worked beautifully with hand tracking. It is reminiscent of the old point-and-click adventures, like the Monkey Island series. 

I will be purchasing the full release, whenever that may be. This is a “can’t miss” vr experience!

Beautiful graphics, (some of the best I’ve seen on the Quest), interesting puzzles, and strong Monkey Island vibes.

I hope they make it into a full game.  I’d happily pay AAA flat game money ($60) to play a full adventure like this.

It’s almost painful to play not knowing if it’ll ever be more than just a wonderful hand tracking demo.

You had me at quippy dialogue. 

It is a fun demo, worth trying out. I would love to see it evolve into a full, long game.

Hand tracking works well. The "exit posession" gesture I had some problem getting right, though. The game can be played with controllers too, so that's great.

Puzzles have a good balance. The globe took me the longest to solve. You always have a, more or less, helpful parrot to assist you.
Really enjoyed it, hope they make a full game, I loved monkey island & this is similar 10/10 for me

reviews.review_title: Fun short pirate demo w/ puzzles.
reviews.review_description: Enjoyed that the game used hand tracking. Puzzles were fun and very good visuals. Dialogue and themes more adult oriented. Left me wanting to play more. Hope game gets a full game release in the future.

reviews.review_title: Fun needs more to do though
reviews.review_description: It was fun and I can’t wait for the full release though I didn’t know how to ask the bird for help other than that it was a fun game can’t wait for more
